message:
test(fcp-core): pin OperationIntent JSON+CBOR shape + IntentStatus/OperationStatus casing-divergence sentinel (flywheel_connectors-myiwt)

Bead asks for IntentManifest serde tag JSON+CBOR roundtrip pinning. No
type literally named IntentManifest exists in fcp-core; the closest
manifest-shaped intent struct is OperationIntent at operation.rs:110.
The serde "tag" surface is the related status enums. Existing
operation_golden_vectors.rs covers OperationIntent CBOR round-trip +
signable_bytes determinism; this pin adds JSON shape + cross-format
consistency + the status-enum matrix.

Coverage: OperationIntent 9-field JSON shape pinned, optional-fields-as-null
shape (no skip_serializing_if so Some/None distinguishable on wire),
JSON + CBOR full round-trip, JSON+CBOR decode to same struct.
IntentStatus 5-variant snake_case Display + serde matrix + CBOR
round-trip + PascalCase rejection. OperationStatus 4-variant DEFAULT
PascalCase serde (no rename_all) + snake_case rejection sentinel.

Critical: cross-enum casing-divergence sentinel — IntentStatus::Pending
serializes "pending" while OperationStatus::Pending serializes "Pending"
(PascalCase). Pin the divergence so harmonizing one side accidentally
to match the other (silently merging two distinct status streams in
operator dashboards) is caught loudly.

IdempotencyEntry round-trip preserves embedded IntentStatus snake_case
through JSON + CBOR.

16 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-myiwt cargo test -p
fcp-core --test intent_manifest_serde_tag_matrix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
